reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, siempre tienen combustible. Excelente atención. Y baños limpios .

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, they always have fuel. Excellent service. And clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Buen y amable servicio. Ubicado en pleno centro de la ciudad. El playón es relativamente pequeño por lo que se recomienda ir en horarios dónde la congestión  automotor es reducida y así tener fácil y cómodo acceso.

(Translated by Google)
Good and friendly service. Located right in the city center. The parking lot is relatively small, so it's recommended to go during off-peak hours for easy and convenient access.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpdUstTUZnEAE

reviews.comment:
En pleno centro de Córdoba una hermosa estación de servicio con una atención espectacular!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Right in the heart of Córdoba, a beautiful gas station with spectacular service!

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Baños cerrados y sucios. Tenés que ir a pedir la llave al shop. Una vergüenza que sean ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Bathrooms are closed and dirty. You have to go to the shop to get the key. It's a disgrace that they're an ACA.
